title: Is it possible to automatically create an item on a board #2 with the item name being one of the columns on a board #1?
excerpt:
Hi, 
I need to automatically create an item on board #2 from a column “Contacts” on board #1. So if an item is created on a board #1 is it possible to create an item automatically on a board #2, but for the item name on …

posts.author: valeriasem (Valeria)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I need to automatically create an item on board #2 from a column “Contacts” on board #1. So if an item is created on a board #1 is it possible to create an item automatically on a board #2, but for the item name on a board #2 to be information in the column “Contacts” on a board #1? And is it possible to add an item name on a board #1 to a board #2 as a column next to the respective column “Contacts” on a board #1?
